homeDesc: Register your complaint, upload photos, share location and track progress with a tracking code.
homeHeroDesc: Say goodbye to repeated office visits! With our smart tracking system, you can register and track Nagar Nigam complaints right from your home—anytime, anywhere.
aboutDesc: This platform empowers citizens by providing an easy-to-use complaint management system for municipal services. Our mission is to bridge the communication gap between the Nagar Nigam and the public using digital innovation.
f1d: Track your complaint live with status updates at every stage of the resolution process.
f2d: Upload a photo of the issue so authorities can better understand and respond effectively.
f3d: Auto-fetch your location so complaints can be accurately mapped to your area.
f4d: Register your complaint within seconds with our simplified and mobile-friendly form.
f5d: Receive SMS or Email alerts when your complaint status changes.
f6d: Admin users can manage, assign, and resolve complaints through a centralized dashboard.
ctaDesc: Join thousands of citizens already making a difference in their neighborhoods!
footerText: Nagar Nigam Complaint Tracker. All rights reserved.
loginRequired: Please login to track your complaint.
